languages.text: {n}Толпа вокруг издает пробирающий до мурашек гул, вторя вашим словам. Батошски яростно оглядывается. На секунду вам кажется, что он не отступит, но все же Иждриг разжимает хватку и отходит.{/n}
{n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Толпа вокруг издает пробирающий до мурашек гул, вторя вашим словам. Батошски яростно оглядывается. На секунду вам кажется, что он не отступит, но все же Иждриг разжимает хватку и отходит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The crowd erupts into a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in a fury. For a second, you think he won't back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}
{n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}
{n}Unable to resist the pressure, the colonel releases you and rolls to the side.{/n}
{n}The crowd erupts into a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in a fury. For a second, you think he won't back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

{n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

languages.text: {n}圧力に耐えきれず、大佐は手を離して横へ転がる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to resist the pressure, the colonel releases you and rolls to the side.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}圧力に耐えきれず、大佐は手を離して横へ転がる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La foule soutient vos paroles par un cri d'acclamation perçant. Batoshski observe la scène, furieux. Vous vous dites qu'il ne renoncera pas, mais il finit par relâcher son étreinte et reculer d'un pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La foule soutient vos paroles par un cri d'acclamation perçant. Batoshski observe la scène, furieux. Vous vous dites qu'il ne renoncera pas, mais il finit par relâcher son étreinte et reculer d'un pas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kalabalık, ürpertici bir kükremeyle sözlerini yankılıyor. Batoshski öfkeyle etrafına bakınıyor. Bir an için geri adım atmayacağını düşünüyorsun ama sonra tutuşunu gevşetip uzaklaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kalabalık, ürpertici bir kükremeyle sözlerini yankılıyor. Batoshski öfkeyle etrafına bakınıyor. Bir an için geri adım atmayacağını düşünüyorsun ama sonra tutuşunu gevşetip uzaklaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Menge bricht in lauten Jubel aus und wiederholt deine Worte. Batoshski lässt wütend den Blick schweifen. Eine Sekunde lang denkst du, er wird nicht aufgeben, aber dann lockert er seinen Griff und tritt einen Schritt zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Menge bricht in lauten Jubel aus und wiederholt deine Worte. Batoshski lässt wütend den Blick schweifen. Eine Sekunde lang denkst du, er wird nicht aufgeben, aber dann lockert er seinen Griff und tritt einen Schritt zurück.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La multitud estalla en un rugido escalofriante, repitiendo tus palabras. Batoshski mira alrededor, furioso. Durante un momento, crees que no se echará atrás, pero entonces relaja su agarre y se aleja un paso.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La multitud estalla en un rugido escalofriante, repitiendo tus palabras. Batoshski mira alrededor, furioso. Durante un momento, crees que no se echará atrás, pero entonces relaja su agarre y se aleja un paso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}人群爆发出令人不寒而栗的怒吼，齐声呼应着你的话。巴托什斯基愤怒地环顾四周。有那么一瞬，你以为他不会退让，但他还是松开了手，退到一旁。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The crowd erupts with a chilling roar, echoing your words. Batoshski glares around in fury. For a second, you think he will not back down, but then he relaxes his grip and steps away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}人群爆发出令人不寒而栗的怒吼，齐声呼应着你的话。巴托什斯基愤怒地环顾四周。有那么一瞬，你以为他不会退让，但他还是松开了手，退到一旁。{/n}
